notes: Mostly solid Tetris implementation with good DAS/ghost piece/wall kicks, but has a ReferenceError (toClearLength vs toClear.length) that fires on every line clear, and minor DAS double-move on first press.
Game looks and controls great, but a fatal typo ('toClearLength is not defined') crashes the game the moment you clear a line.

This looks like Tetris and basic controls exist, but a clear JavaScript bug in line clear scoring (`toClearLength` undefined) breaks normal gameplay on any line clear and significantly damages functionality/playability.
